info.name: Microsoft Azure PaymentManagementClient
info.description: The billing client allows you to view and manage your billing details programmatically.

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Billing Billingaccounts Billingaccountname Paymentmethods Paymentmethodname

query.description: (Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request. The current version is 2021-10-01.

variable.description: (Required) The ID that uniquely identifies a billing account.
(Required) The ID that uniquely identifies a payment method.

request.description: Gets a payment method available for a billing account. The operation is supported only for billing accounts with agreement type Microsoft Customer Agreement.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Providers Microsoft Billing Billingaccounts Billingaccountname Paymentmethods

query.description: (Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request. The current version is 2021-10-01.

variable.description: (Required) The ID that uniquely identifies a billing account.

request.description: Lists the payment methods available for a billing account. Along with the payment methods owned by the caller, these payment methods can be attached to a billing profile to make payments. The operation is supported only for billing accounts with agreement type Microsoft Customer Agreement.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: (Required) The version of the API to be used with the client request. The current version is 2021-10-01.

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.
